chatbot.title: AviLab Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: Demo concierge • not live AI
chatbot.welcome: Hi—I'm AviLab's concierge. Ask about services, timelines, or how we work with AI.
chatbot.reply1: We build production AI, web, and mobile systems with Silicon Valley-grade polish. Tell me your timeline and stack preferences.
chatbot.reply2: For enterprise work, we typically pair a technical architect with design lead. Want a scoping call this week?
chatbot.reply3: Upload a brief in the client application section—our team reviews every submission within 24 hours.

jordan.quote: AviLab operates like an embedded product team—velocity, taste, and engineering depth we rarely see.

elena.quote: They turned a vague AI idea into a polished platform our executives actually use every day.

startup.name: Startup
startup.blurb: For founders validating a bold MVP with design + engineering.

business.name: Business
business.blurb: For teams scaling revenue with reliable platforms and AI features.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.blurb: For regulated environments and mission-critical rollouts.

timelines.a: We work in focused phases with weekly demos. Most MVPs land in 8–12 weeks; enterprise programs are mapped to your procurement and compliance cadence.

pricing.a: Engagements can be fixed-scope, monthly retainers, or hybrid. We align incentives to outcomes—not seat time—and document assumptions up front.

technologies.q: Which technologies do you standardize on?
technologies.a: We bias toward TypeScript, Next.js, and modern cloud-native stacks, but we meet you where your data and teams already live.

support.q: What does support look like after launch?
support.a: We offer proactive monitoring, on-call rotations, and roadmap grooming so your product keeps improving without heroics.

maintenance.q: Do you handle maintenance and iteration?
maintenance.a: Yes—most clients keep a fractional squad for performance budgets, dependency health, and continuous UX refinement.

ai.q: How do AI integrations work in production?
ai.a: We design for evals, guardrails, observability, and cost controls from day one—so models are reliable, measurable, and reversible.

application.title: Tell us what you're building
application.lead: Secure intake—encrypted in transit. Configure Telegram, email, and database in production.
application.dropzone: Drop files or click to upload
application.success: Received. Our team will reach out within one business day.
application.errorGeneric: Could not submit. Check configuration or try again shortly.
